content.method: Natural experiment / difference-in-differences using regions with varying maintainer exemption density and school-choice enforcement; survey and administrative tracking of student flows following any local capacity changes or the ongoing demographic contraction as a quasi-treatment.
content.question: If 6/8-year tracks were delayed or abolished, would displaced sorting demand reallocate to standard 4-year gimnaziums, vocational tracks, church/private schools, or informal tutoring markets, and what would be the equity effect of each displacement pathway?
content.why_it_matters: This determines whether structural reform (T2, T6) actually reduces segregation or merely relocates it to less regulated channels, directly affecting expected net benefit of the most disruptive proposals.
